metadata.seed: About to end it I've never felt happy being alive but for the first time in a long while I feel relieved. Hope you guys do better than I will cos my time is up. Later guys :)

patient.query: About to end it I've never felt happy being alive but for the first time in a long while I feel relieved. Hope you guys do better than I will cos my time is up. Later guys :)

llm_response.response: I'm so incredibly sorry to hear you're going through this, and it takes immense courage to reach out even in this way. That feeling of relief you're describing suggests a deep exhaustion and a sense of release from prolonged suffering, and while I understand you feel your time is up, please know there are people who want to help you find a path forward. There's still time to explore those feelings and find support; please reach out to a crisis hotline or mental health professional—you can find resources at [https://findahelpline.com/](https://findahelpline.com/).
